title: Battery swelling and heat isolation card
summary: Stop charging, avoid pressure or puncture, move people away, and place the device only where this can be done without handling a smoking or burning battery.
content: Stop charging, avoid pressure or puncture, move people away, and place the device only where this can be done without handling a smoking or burning battery. Call emergency services for fire, smoke, rapid heating, hissing, or inability to isolate the area safely. Do not put a damaged lithium battery in a pocket, normal rubbish, or an enclosed container.
